queryBuilder.datasets.joinOnColumnsDescr: Here you can specify which columns should match between tables when combining the data.
If no conditions are specified, columns are automatically matched by name.
queryBuilder.datasets.joinTypeFullDescri: Keeps all rows from both tables.
queryBuilder.datasets.joinTypeInnerDescr: Keeps only the rows that have matching values in both tables.
queryBuilder.datasets.joinTypeLeftDescri: Keeps all rows from the left table, and the matching rows from the right table.
queryBuilder.datasets.joinTypeRightDescr: Keeps all rows from the right table, and the matching rows from the left table.
queryBuilder.datasets.undefinedColumnInO: A condition is incomplete. Please choose a column or remove the condition.
